name: Rolf Gates
bio: Rolf Gates is a yoga teacher, author, and former US Army Airborne Ranger who found yoga and meditation in recovery from addiction. He is the author of 'Meditations from the Mat' and 'Meditations on Intention and Being.' He leads teacher trainings and workshops nationally and integrates classical yoga philosophy with accessible, inclusive teaching. He is on the faculty at Kripalu Center for Yoga and Health and is a guiding teacher for the Yoga, Meditation and Recovery conference.
